Name: Dropdown menu
Description: This dropdown menu display sort and filter option
Dynamic Behavior:
Clicking on the column header will display this dropdown menu.

If the column only have filter function, clicking on the column header will open the filter modal dialog box directly.

Name: Sorted indicator
Description: This indicator means currently, this object table is sorted by this column
Dynamic Behavior: There must be one, and only one, column sorted in the object table

Name: Sort options
Description: The user can select to sort a column with in ascending or descending order.
Dynamic Behavior:
Selecting a sorting option will refresh the object list with the selected sort order. 

A sort direction arrow will be shown next to the column name
Default State: By default the primary column in the object table will be sort in descending order.

Name: Filter option
Description: The user can select the filter option.

Name: Filter chip
Description: Once a user has selected a filter option it is displayed here, with a delete button.
Dynamic Behavior:
If the user selects multiple values to filter by, then all the values are listed next to the column name in the chip

Display filter chips in multi-lines when it’s more than one line. Keep 32px space between global button if there is. Object%20Table%20309374cae3fa8113b439c8bb096e0478.md

The values in the filter chips would be in alphabetical order. If users add a new value, it will added in alphabetical order as well.

Clicking on the filter chip, pop up the dialog box to edit.
Error State: If there are no object results for multi-filters, the object list should show an empty state graphic.
